name: py-presencedb

metadata.name: py-presencedb
metadata.summary: API wrapper for the presencedb (undocumented) api

documentation:
# py-presencedb [![forthebadge made-with-python](http://ForTheBadge.com/images/badges/made-with-python.svg)](https://www.python.org/) Python API wrapper for the API ## Installation **Python 3.11 or higher is required** Install The PyPi Version: ```sh py -3 -m pip install -U presencedb ``` You may also install the development version: ```sh pip install git+https://github.com/xFGhoul/py-presencedb.git ``` ## Usage Quick Example: ```py import asyncio from presencedb import Client client = Client() async def get_user(id): user = await client.get_user(id, format=True) print(user.current_activity) print(user.stats.top_activities) print(user.stats.total_duration) loop = asyncio.new_event_loop() loop.run_until_complete(get_user(1234)) ``` You can find more examples in the [examples](https://github.com/xFGhoul/py-presencedb/blob/dev/examples/) directory. ## Files and Explanations `├──`[`.github`](https://github.com/xFGhoul/py-presencedb/blob/dev/.github) — GitHub configuration including CI/CD workflows
`├──`[`docs`](https://github.com/xFGhoul/py-presencedb/blob/dev/docs) — Developer Documentation
`├──`[`tests`](https://github.com/xFGhoul/py-presencedb/blob/dev/tests) — Tests
`├──`[`examples`](https://github.com/xFGhoul/py-presencedb/blob/dev/examples) — Examples Showing How To Use The Wrapper
`├──`[`presencedb`](https://github.com/xFGhoul/py-presencedb/blob/dev/pyprotector) — Source Code Of py-presencedb
> Made With ❤️ By `ghoul#1337`

classes.name: presencedb.errors.PresenceDBException
documentation: The base PresenceDB Exception. All PresenceDB Exceptions inherit from this.

classes.name: presencedb.errors.HTTPException
documentation:
An exception raised when an HTTP Exception occurs from the API.

# Attributes

response: {class}`aiohttp.ClientResponse`

: The response from the API.

data: {class}`Any`

: The data returned from the API.

classes.name: presencedb.errors.NotFound
documentation:
Raised When Object Could Not Be Found

This inherits from {class}`HTTPException`.

classes.name: presencedb.errors.PresenceDBError
documentation:
Raised When Internal Server Error Occurs

This inherits from {class}`HTTPException`.

functions.name: presencedb.utils.icon_to_bytes
documentation:
Converts Icon URL To Bytes

# Parameters

icon

: Icon URL

# Returns

io.BytesIO

: Bytes Like Object Of Icon

functions.name: presencedb.utils.humanize_duration
documentation:
Generates a Human Readable Duration

# Parameters

number: {class}`int`

: Duration To Format

type: Optional\[Union[HUMNANIZE_HOURS, HUMANIZE_DAYS]\]

: If The Output Should Be Days or Hours, defaults to HUMNANIZE_HOURS

# Returns

str

: Humanized Duration

functions.name: presencedb.utils.humanize_iso_format
documentation:
Generatess a Human Readable Duration from ISO Format

# Parameters

date: {class}`int`

: Date That Needs To Be Formatted

type: {class}`Optional[Union[HUMNANIZE_HOURS, HUMANIZE_DAYS]]`

: If The Output Should Be Days or Hours, Defaults to HUMANIZE_DAYS

# Returns

str

: Humanized Duration

classes.name: presencedb.client.Client

methods.name: presencedb.client.Client.cleanup
documentation:
Closes The Current Client Session

Raises
------
RuntimeError
    If The Session Was Already Closed

methods.name: presencedb.client.Client.get_user
documentation:
Get A User's Profile

# Parameters

user_id

: Discord ID of User

format

: If To Format User Data, by default False

# Returns

User

: Object Response Of User

# Raises

UserNotFound

: If The User Was Not Found

methods.name: presencedb.client.Client.get_users
documentation:
Get Multiple User Profiles

# Parameters

user_id

: Discord ID's of Users

format

: If To Format User Data, by default False

# Returns

List[User]

: List of Users

# Raises

UserNotFound

: If The Users Were Not Found

methods.name: presencedb.client.Client.get_activity
documentation:
Get An Activity

# Parameters

activity_id

: ID of Activity

format

: If Duration Values Should Be Formatted, by default False

# Returns

Activity

: Object Of JSON Response

# Raises

ActivityNotFound

: If The Activity Could Not Be Found

methods.name: presencedb.client.Client.get_activities
documentation:
Get Multiple Activities

# Parameters

activity_ids: List\[{class}`int`\], List\[{class}`str`\], List[ActivityID]

: ID of Activities

format

: If Duration Values Should Be Formatted, by default False

# Returns

List[Activity]

: List of Found Activities

# Raises

ActivityNotFound

: If The Activity Could Not Be Found

methods.name: presencedb.client.Client.get_top_activities
documentation:
Returns Top Activities

Returns
-------
List[TopActivity]
    List Of Top Activities

Raises
------
ActivitiesNotFound
    Top Activities Could Not Be Fetched

methods.name: presencedb.client.Client.get_trending_activities
documentation:
Returns Current Trending Activities

Returns
-------
List[TrendingActivity]
    List Of Trending Activities
Raises
------
ActivitiesNotFound
    Trending Activities Could Not Be Fetched

Client Interface For Interacting With PresenceDB API

Parameters
-----------
session: Optional[aiohttp.ClientSession]
    Client Session Used For HTTP Requests

classes.name: presencedb.activity.Activity
documentation:
Class Interface Representing An Activity

# Attributes

id: {class}`int`

: Internal PresenceDB ID of Activity

name: {class}`str`

: Name of Activity

discord_id: {class}`int`

: ID of Activity

added: {class}`str`

: Date Activity Was Added

icon: {class}`Avatar`

: Activity Icon

color: {class}`str`

: Color of Activity

stats: ActivityStats

: Stats of Activity

classes.name: presencedb.activity.ActivityStats
documentation:
Class Representing Stats of an Activity

# Attributes

total_duration: {class}`str`

: Total duration of activity recorded

trending_duration: {class}`str`

: Trending Duration of Activities

top_users: List[TopUser]

: List of Top Users For The Activity

playtime_dates: List[PlaytimeDate]

: List of Playtime Dates For Activity

classes.name: presencedb.user.User
documentation:
Class Interface Containing User Attributes

# Attributes

id: {class}`int`

: PresenceDB Internal User ID

discord_id: {class}`int`

: User Discord ID

name: {class}`str`

: User's Name

discriminator: {class}`str`

: User's Discord Discriminator

inactive: {class}`str`

: Returns a Date of when The User Became Inactive

added: {class}`str`

: Date User's Account Was Added

color: {class}`str`

: Color Of User's Account

avatar: {class}`Avatar`

: User Avatar

plus: {class}`bool`

: If The User Has Subscribed To PresenceDB Plus

tracker: {class}`Dict`

: Information about Current User Activity

timestamp: {class}`str`

: Timestamp of Current Activity

current_activities: List[CurrentActivity]

: List of Current User Activities

stats: UserStats

: Object Representing User Statistics

tag: {class}`str`

: Combination of `self.name` + `self.discriminator`

classes.name: presencedb.user.UserStats
documentation:
Class Interface Representing Stats of a User

# Attributes

total_duration: {class}`str`

: Total duration of activity recorded

trending_duration: {class}`int`

: Trending Duration of Activities

top_users: List[TopUser]

: List of Top Users For The Activity

playtime_dates: List[PlaytimeDate]

: List of Playtime Dates For Activity

top_activities: List[TopActivity]

: List of Top Activities For User

trending_activities: List[TrendingActivity]

: List of Trending Activities For User

avatar_history: List[AvatarHistory]

: List of Avatars Users Recorded
